audit_items.proof_trace: All SDS pointers obtained from HT iterators/random accessors (which point into dict-owned memory) are read and copied via addReplyBulkCBuffer/createStringObject before any setTypeRemove/dictDelete call that would free the original key; temporary sdsdup copies are freed exactly once after use. In setTypeConvert, the intset pointer is freed only after the iterator loop completes and setTypeReleaseIterator is called, and in spopWithCountCommand CASE 3 the iterator over the old set is released (L537) before dbOverwrite frees the old set object (L540).
